blog_articles.title: Headless Commerce in 2025: A Practical Guide for Growing Brands
blog_articles.content: Headless commerce separates your frontend experience layer from your backend ecommerce engine. In this guide we break down core concepts, architecture options, and when headless actually makes sense for mid-market brands. We cover implementation costs, team requirements, and real-world examples from Shopify, BigCommerce, and custom headless builds.
blog_articles.excerpt: Understand when headless commerce makes sense in 2025, how much it costs, and which platforms are best suited for a headless approach.

blog_articles.title: Headless vs Traditional Shopify: Which Build Is Right for You?
blog_articles.content: Choosing between a traditional Shopify theme build and a headless setup can be confusing. This article compares performance, flexibility, implementation timelines, and maintenance trade-offs. We outline decision frameworks for merchants at different revenue stages and share common pitfalls teams run into when going headless too early.
blog_articles.excerpt: Compare headless and traditional Shopify builds across cost, speed, and flexibility to decide which approach fits your roadmap.

blog_articles.title: Is Headless Commerce Right for Your Ecommerce Brand?
blog_articles.content: Headless commerce has been heavily marketed as the future of ecommerce, but it isn't a match for every brand. In this piece we unpack the operational impact of going headless, how it changes your internal workflows, and the signals that your team might be ready to evaluate headless architectures.
blog_articles.excerpt: Headless isn't for everyone. Learn the indicators that your team may actually benefit from a headless setup.

blog_articles.title: Shopify Launch Checklist for 2026: 45 Things to Verify Before You Go Live
blog_articles.content: A step-by-step Shopify launch checklist including tax setup, shipping rules, payment gateways, theme QA, CRO quick wins, and analytics tracking. Use this as a blueprint to ensure your new store launches smoothly and is ready to scale from day one.
blog_articles.excerpt: A practical launch checklist covering configuration, design QA, and marketing setup for your new Shopify store.

blog_articles.title: Migrating from WooCommerce to Shopify: A Non-Scary Playbook
blog_articles.content: This playbook walks through preparing your WooCommerce store for migration, mapping data, handling URLs and SEO, and planning your cutover. We include a realistic timeline and cost breakdown for small, mid-market, and enterprise migrations.
blog_articles.excerpt: A detailed migration playbook to move from WooCommerce to Shopify with minimal downtime and SEO risk.

blog_articles.title: 9 UX Principles That Should Drive Your Next Ecommerce Redesign
blog_articles.content: Great ecommerce redesigns start with UX fundamentals: clarity, hierarchy, feedback, and performance. We break down nine principles with real examples from fashion, beauty, and B2B brands, plus before-and-after metrics from recent redesign projects.
blog_articles.excerpt: Learn the UX principles that separate high-performing ecommerce redesigns from purely cosmetic reskins.

blog_articles.title: From First Test to Testing Program: Your 12-Month CRO A/B Testing Roadmap
blog_articles.content: If you're new to CRO, jumping straight into dozens of tests can backfire. We outline a 12-month roadmap starting from foundational tracking, through initial quick-win tests, to mature experimentation programs across product, cart, and checkout.
blog_articles.excerpt: A staged CRO roadmap that shows how to evolve from one-off tests to a consistent experimentation program.

blog_articles.title: Holiday Readiness Checklist for Fashion & Apparel Ecommerce Teams
blog_articles.content: Fashion and apparel brands see a disproportionate spike in peak season. This guide provides a checklist for inventory planning, onsite merchandising, performance testing, CRO quick wins, and campaign coordination.
blog_articles.excerpt: A holiday readiness checklist tailored for fashion & apparel ecommerce brands.

blog_articles.title: SEO for Fashion Brands: Collection Architecture That Actually Ranks
blog_articles.content: Fashion SEO is fiercely competitive. We show how to structure collections, filters, and internal links so that your most important categories can rank for non-branded terms without creating a thin-content mess.
blog_articles.excerpt: How to architect your fashion store collections for long-term SEO growth.

blog_articles.title: Scaling Mid-Market Stores with BigCommerce: When It Beats DIY Stacks
blog_articles.content: BigCommerce offers a strong middle ground between fully custom headless builds and simpler SaaS platforms. We break down features, extensibility, and total cost of ownership for mid-market brands considering BigCommerce.
blog_articles.excerpt: Where BigCommerce shines for scaling merchants who have outgrown entry-level platforms.

blog_articles.title: Lifecycle Email Flows Every Ecommerce Brand Should Have
blog_articles.content: From welcome series to post-purchase education, lifecycle email flows are the backbone of retention. We outline the core flows, benchmarks, and examples of high-performing sequences across industries.
blog_articles.excerpt: A reference library of essential lifecycle email flows for ecommerce.

blog_articles.title: Magento Performance Optimization: Quick Wins Before a Full Replatform
blog_articles.content: If a full replatform isn’t on the table this year, there are still plenty of ways to speed up your existing Magento store. We cover caching, image optimization, hosting configuration, and frontend clean-up tactics.
blog_articles.excerpt: How to improve Magento performance even if you’re not ready to replatform yet.

case_studies.summary: We implemented a headless frontend over an existing ecommerce backend to deliver app-like performance for OmniBeauty's multi-brand marketplace.

platforms.name: Shopify
platforms.description: A leading SaaS ecommerce platform ideal for fast-growing DTC and mid-market brands, with a large app ecosystem and hosted infrastructure.

platforms.name: Adobe Commerce (Magento)
platforms.description: Highly flexible, open-source rooted platform suited to complex catalogs and custom requirements, typically with higher implementation and maintenance cost.

platforms.name: BigCommerce
platforms.description: SaaS ecommerce platform with strong multi-storefront and B2B features, offering a balance between flexibility and lower maintenance overhead.

platforms.name: WooCommerce
platforms.description: An open-source ecommerce plugin for WordPress, popular with content-driven brands and teams already invested in the WordPress ecosystem.

platforms.name: Other / Custom Platform
platforms.description: Custom builds or less common platforms such as headless-first solutions and homegrown stacks. Evaluated on a case-by-case basis.

services.name: Shopify Store Development
services.short_description: Launch-ready Shopify stores, from theme setup to fully custom builds.
services.long_description: We design, build, and launch Shopify stores tailored to your brand and operations. Engagements range from lean launch packages for emerging brands to fully custom Shopify builds with complex integrations, multi-warehouse logistics, and internationalization.

services.name: Ecommerce Redesign
services.short_description: CRO-focused redesigns that modernize your storefront and improve performance.
services.long_description: Our ecommerce redesign projects combine UX research, conversion best practices, and modern frontend development. We rework navigation, collection and product page templates, and checkout flows across Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and Magento.

services.name: Ongoing Support & Maintenance
services.short_description: Monthly retainers for maintenance, monitoring, and incremental improvements.
services.long_description: Keep your ecommerce stack healthy with a dedicated team handling updates, QA, bug fixes, performance tuning, and small feature requests. Flexible retainers scale from basic care plans to embedded squads supporting complex roadmaps.

services.name: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
services.short_description: Research-driven CRO audits, A/B testing, and strategy sessions.
services.long_description: Our CRO team runs quantitative and qualitative research, develops experimentation roadmaps, and executes A/B and multivariate tests. We also offer focused CRO strategy sessions to help you prioritize the highest-impact experiments.

services.name: Marketing & Growth
services.short_description: Retention, email, and performance marketing retainers for ecommerce brands.
services.long_description: We help ecommerce teams grow revenue through lifecycle email, onsite personalization, paid social, and search campaigns. Engagements are structured as ongoing growth retainers aligned to clear revenue and ROI goals.

guides.title: BigCommerce vs Shopify vs Magento: 2026 Total Cost of Ownership Comparison
guides.summary: A side-by-side comparison of BigCommerce, Shopify, and Magento focused on implementation cost, total cost of ownership, and operational complexity for mid-market brands.
guides.content: This guide breaks down license fees, implementation costs, hosting, maintenance, and typical integration work for BigCommerce, Shopify, and Magento. It includes example budgets for new builds and replatforms, and highlights when BigCommerce can deliver the lowest implementation cost for multi-storefront and B2B scenarios.

guides.title: Shopify Implementation Blueprint for New Ecommerce Stores
guides.summary: A practical blueprint for planning, designing, and launching a new Shopify store from discovery through go-live.
guides.content: We outline the key phases of a Shopify implementation, including discovery, IA and UX, theme selection or custom theme development, app selection, data migration, QA, and launch. Sample timelines and responsibilities are provided for teams with and without in-house developers.

guides.title: Replatforming from Magento to SaaS: Risks, Timelines, and Mitigations
guides.summary: Best practices for merchants moving from Magento to Shopify or BigCommerce, with a focus on reducing risk and protecting SEO.
guides.content: This guide covers stakeholder alignment, data mapping, URL and SEO strategy, and technical considerations for replatforming from Magento to a SaaS platform. It includes a risk checklist and example project plans for 12–20 week replatforms.

guides.title: Headless Commerce Platform Landscape for 2026
guides.summary: An overview of common headless commerce architectures across Shopify, BigCommerce, and custom backends.
guides.content: We map typical headless commerce stacks, including headless Shopify and BigCommerce builds, and discuss when to use traditional vs headless approaches. The guide highlights trade-offs in cost, speed, and team structure.
